<?php /** * XHTML 1.1 Object Module, defines elements for generic object inclusion * @warning Users will commonly use <embed> to cater to legacy browsers: this * module does not allow this sort of behavior */ class HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule_Object extends HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule { /** * @type string */ public $name = 'Object'; /** * @type bool */ public $safe = false; /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config */ public function setup($config) { $this->addElement( 'object', 'Inline', 'Optional: #PCDATA | Flow | param', 'Common', array( 'archive' => 'URI', 'classid' => 'URI', 'codebase' => 'URI', 'codetype' => 'Text', 'data' => 'URI', 'declare' => 'Bool#declare', 'height' => 'Length', 'name' => 'CDATA', 'standby' => 'Text', 'tabindex' => 'Number', 'type' => 'ContentType', 'width' => 'Length' ) ); $this->addElement( 'param', false, 'Empty', null, array( 'id' => 'ID', 'name*' => 'Text', 'type' => 'Text', 'value' => 'Text', 'valuetype' => 'Enum#data,ref,object' ) ); } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
